page_metadata.biotools__summary: BARS is a statistical method that bridges the gap between single-locus and haplotype-based tests of association. It is based on the non-parametric regression techniques embodied by Bayesian Adaptive Regression Splines.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BARS is a statistical method that bridges the gap between single-locus and haplotype-based tests of association. It is based on the non-parametric regression techniques embodied by Bayesian Adaptive Regression Splines.
